healthReason: #1384 and #1385 in design phase for 3rd consecutive EM cycle — implementation must begin this cycle or health escalates to RED. #1473 blocker (governance-self-modification blocks EM state writes) persists at ageRuns=3, already escalated to director. summary: Cycle 2026-03-31T11:00Z (cycle 3). KE-9 sprint: #1384 (browser governance) and #1385 (irreversible action detection) remain in design phase — 3rd EM cycle with no implementation or PRs. This is the design-phase limit; implementation must begin this cycle. #1473 blocker persists (ageRuns=3, escalated to director at run 2). Two new issues filed to kernel squad: #1477 (P1 — telemetry default URL 'telemetry.agentguard.dev' unreachable, events silently dropped for new users) and #1478 (P2 — Go fast-path allow-decisions produce no cloud telemetry). 0 kernel-authored PRs in flight. 3 open PRs from other squads (#1505 octi-pulpo-em, #1504 hq-em, #1503 studio-em) — not kernel-owned, no action. Swarm P0 alerts (#1431, #1452) not kernel-owned.

sprintStatus.goal: New governance invariant design — browser agents + irreversible actions
sprintStatus.note: 3 full EM cycles in design phase without code is beyond acceptable threshold. Implementation must begin this cycle.

issues.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
issues.note: 3rd EM cycle in design phase. Senior coder must begin implementation NOW. Minimum deliverable: action class decision (browser.* extension) + stub definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts (BrowserScopeViolation, BrowserStateViolation, BrowserPacingViolation). Reference: packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts + packages/invariants/src/checker.ts.

issues.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
issues.note: 3rd EM cycle in design phase. Secondary agent must begin prototype NOW. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema already exists in packages/events/src/schema.ts. Start with packages/kernel/src/decision.ts hook for irreversible action detection (infra.destroy, git.force-push, deploy.trigger to prod, file.delete with no backup).

newIssues.title: bug(telemetry): default fallback URL 'telemetry.agentguard.dev' unreachable — events silently dropped
newIssues.fix: Update default fallback URL from 'https://telemetry.agentguard.dev' to 'https://agentguard-cloud-api-server.vercel.app'. One-line change. Filed by studio-senior during workspace#273 E2E gate. Impacts all new users who haven't run 'agentguard cloud connect'.
newIssues.note: Simple fix — assign as P1 maintenance item. Can be done alongside sprint work.

newIssues.title: feat(telemetry): Go fast-path skips cloud telemetry — allow decisions invisible in dashboard
newIssues.recommendation: Accept Option 2 — document that dashboard shows governance-evaluated events, not total tool volume. Label dashboard accordingly. This is acceptable for the May 6 demo. Full fix (emit lightweight allow event from Go fast-path) is a KE-10 item.
newIssues.note: Not a correctness issue. Low urgency. Document for now.

prQueue.note: 0 kernel-authored PRs. PR budget 0/3. 3 open PRs from other squads — kernel has no merge authority over these.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.recommendation: Director: review and unblock. Kernel senior: fix OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to add '.agentguard/squads/**' exemption (same fix class as #1427 persona.env exemption). This is a 1-line pattern addition. Worktree isolation currently bypasses the invariant, so EM state writes succeed via that workaround.

escalations.reason: Blocker #1473 persists at ageRuns=3. Already escalated at run 2. No resolution yet.

Sprint features #1384 and #1385 in design phase for 3 consecutive EM cycles. No implementation. If not started this cycle, sprint KE-9 is at risk of rolling into KE-10 incomplete. Architect attention needed to unblock design decisions.

escalationRules.notes: #1473 persists (ageRuns=3, already escalated). New escalation to architect for design-phase stall on #1384 and #1385 at 3 cycles. No CI failures. 0 governance denials.

no-credential-file-creation false positive on grep -v (invert-match). Adjacent to #1475 (read-only exemption). Carried from prior cycles.
0 governance denials this cycle. All governed operations clean during this EM run.

nextActions.action: Kernel senior: begin implementation on #1384 (browser governance invariants). Design phase at 3 cycles — must produce code this cycle. Minimum: action class decision + stub definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts.
Kernel secondary: begin prototype on #1385 (irreversible action detection). PauseRequested/PauseResolved already in schema. Start hook in packages/kernel/src/decision.ts.
Fix #1477: Update default telemetry URL in apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts from 'https://telemetry.agentguard.dev' to 'https://agentguard-cloud-api-server.vercel.app'. P1 fix, ~1 line of code.
Director: review escalation for #1473 and unblock. Kernel senior: implement .agentguard/squads/** exemption in OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS (packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts).
Kernel secondary: document #1478 as accepted gap — dashboard shows governance-evaluated events, not total tool volume. Add label to dashboard. Full Go fast-path telemetry is KE-10.
Architect: evaluate #1177 policy gap (github.pr.* not in default allow-list) blocking pr-merger-agent. 234 failures. Determine if this is KE-9 maintenance or KE-10 backlog.
